case_title: MINH THANH NGUYEN VS. NABIL JEMAI

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, MINH THANH C/O FRANKLIN LAW OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEMAI, NABIL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-15-2024 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-16-2000, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JEMAI, NABIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, MINH THANH C/O FRANKLIN LAW OFFICE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JEMAI, NABIL STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,812.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, MINH THANH C/O FRANKLIN LAW OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT JEMAI, NABIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-15-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-15-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-15-2024 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF MINH THANH NGUYEN IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY VIETNAMESE INTERPRETER QUY DAO. DEFENDANT NABIL JEMAI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
